ksa_text: Knowledge of cloud data platform services and infrastructure across major providers, including managed compute, serverless processing, object storage, data warehouse, streaming platforms, and their architectural implications for data and ML workloads.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of infrastructure supporting information technology (IT) for safety, performance, and reliability.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-015 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4098 is insufficient to establish relevance to quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.410, ddat=0.403, eu_ai_act=0.395) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4098 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-015 (composite 0.4098) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4098 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Quantitative Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4098 is not a standard requirement for Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4098, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
